description.value:
### Hit Die
d8.

### Skill Ranks per Level
4 + Int modifier.

### Alignment
any.

### Class Features
See the level table; class-specific sub-choices are described in the Lore section (mechanical sub-choice selection arrives with the B.1.5 framework).

value: L1: Elemental Focus — Choose an element (aether/air/earth/fire/water); defines kinetic blast.
L1: Kinetic Blast — Ranged/melee elemental attack (1d6+Con scaling), the core attack.
L1: Burn — Accept burn (nonlethal, locks HP) to fuel powerful talents; Gather Power reduces burn.
L3: Wild Talent / Elemental Overflow (scaling bonuses for accepting burn).
L20: Omnikinesis — Capstone; use any wild talent.
NOTE: Burn / wild-talent selection is descriptive text pending the B.1.5 sub-choice framework; base stat block is fully mechanical.
